ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle's manufacturer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle's model */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle's engine */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle's transmission */,
  "drive_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle's drive type */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production of the model started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production of the model ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drive_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_type_id") REFERENCES drive_types ("drive_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the characteristic belongs to */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle */,
  "displacement" INTEGER /* Displacement of the vehicle's engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle's engine */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle */,
  "wheelbase" INTEGER /* Wheelbase of the vehicle */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the vehicle */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the vehicle */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the vehicle */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "cargo_capacity" INTEGER /* Cargo capacity of the vehicle in cubic feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the metric belongs to */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Top speed of the vehicle in miles per hour */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance of the vehicle in feet */,
  "handling" TEXT /* Handling rating of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency data point */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the efficiency data belongs to */,
  "mpg_city" REAL /* City miles per gallon of the vehicle */,
  "mpg_highway" REAL /* Highway miles per gallon of the vehicle */,
  "mpg_combined" REAL /* Combined miles per gallon of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity of the vehicle in gallons */,
  "emissions_rating" TEXT /* Emissions rating of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the rating belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the vehicle */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the vehicle */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year when the manufacturer was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "production_volume" INTEGER /* Annual production volume of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the engine */,
  "displacement" INTEGER /* Displacement of the engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine in lb-ft */,
  "fuel_system" TEXT /* Type of fuel system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the transmission */,
  "gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_types" (
  "drive_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive type */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the drive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drive type */,
  "drive_efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of the drive type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the feature belongs to */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature of the vehicle */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
